The '''Plavonian starfish''' was an [[Water/Legends|aquatic]] creature<ref name="LE" /> native to the [[Plavonia system/Legends|Plavonia system]].<ref name="Planetnamia" /> Plavonian starfish could be [[Stuffed Plavonian starfish|stuffed]] and eaten as part of a meal,<ref name="LE" /> and were served aboard the luxury [[Hovertrain/Legends|repulsortrain]] [[Gem of Alderaan]]<ref name="GA">{{DoD|The Gem of Alderaan}}</ref> and at the annual [[Vor-cal Feast]] held aboard the [[House Melantha Orbital Hunting Lodge]] over the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Vycinyth]].<ref name="LE" />

==Appearances==
*{{DoD|The Gem of Alderaan}}
